notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien grounds into a double play, second baseman Alex Freeland to shortstop Hyeseong Kim to first baseman Ryan Ward. Jake McCarthy out at 2nd. Edouard Julien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Hunter Goodman plunked
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Goodman hit by pitch. Mickey Moniak to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Willi Castro GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Willi Castro grounds into a double play, second baseman Alex Freeland to shortstop Hyeseong Kim to first baseman Ryan Ward. Troy Johnston out at 2nd. Willi Castro out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dalton Rushing pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dalton Rushing grounds out, second baseman Willi Castro to first baseman Edouard Julien. Will Smith scores. Max Muncy to 3rd. Andy Pages to 2nd.
